overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit downtown district at dusk. The player character walks along wet sidewalks, crosses a busy street with yellow crosswalks, and enters a covered tunnel beneath a BD Shack overpass.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk next to a concrete escalator structure, approaching an intersection with neon-lit buildings ahead

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with stairs and escalators on the left side of the sidewalk
tall palm tree on the sidewalk median
building with bright pink neon signage reading BOHEMIA
yellow elevated structure with red neon BD SHACK signage spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet concrete sidewalk at dusk, with a large concrete escalator structure on the left and neon-lit buildings ahead. The Bohemia club with pink neon signage becomes visible as the camera approaches the intersection.

events.description: waiting at the crosswalk as futuristic cars pass by, then beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and crossing the street while monitoring passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk spanning the wet asphalt street
tall building-mounted digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection on yellow-striped crosswalks while futuristic cars drive past. The Bohemia club building is now prominent on the left, and a large digital billboard displays advertisements on the right.

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk toward the BD Shack tunnel entrance, passing pedestrians

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past the Bohemia club, approaching the yellow BD Shack overpass structure. The camera moves toward the tunnel entrance as the lighting begins to shift from open sky to covered shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with arched ceiling

events.description: entering the covered tunnel beneath the BD Shack overpass, transitioning from open street to enclosed corridor
lighting shifts from natural dusk to dim artificial light filtering through ceiling grates

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered tunnel toward the bright exit, passing other pedestrians in the dim corridor

notable_agents.action: woman in gray shirt walking ahead toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: arched covered walkway with yellow structural elements and overhead neon signage
green dumpsters and trash containers with graffiti on the left wall
vertical metal bars covering storefronts on the right side of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Walking through the dimly lit covered tunnel with arched ceilings and metal security gates on the right. Trash bins and debris line the left wall while pedestrians walk toward the bright light at the tunnel's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from an open city intersection into a dimly lit urban tunnel. It begins along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a large escalator structure, moving toward the pink neon signage of the Bohemia club as dusk settles over the city. As the camera reaches the intersection, it crosses yellow-striped crosswalks amidst flowing futuristic traffic, passing between the club and a towering digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera continues past the club and approaches a yellow BD Shack overpass, with the open sky gradually giving way to covered shade. Finally, the movement leads into a dimly lit tunnel characterized by arched ceilings and metal security gates, passing debris and pedestrians toward the bright light at the far exit.
